creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: sheldonh->roberto

I did the mdoc transcriptions for the ntp package.  The images which 
are reported to be absent sound like they'd be part of the NTP 
package itself.  Personally, I think that this PR should just be 
closed -- we simply don't need the images in the FreeBSD repo. 
Anyone who wants them can hit the ntp web site or download 
them.
